pages.text: Mfubu, the hippo, lives in his huge pool of water. I love wallowing and diving! SPLISH SPLOSH

blocks.text: Mfubu, the hippo, lives in his huge pool of water. I love wallowing and diving!
SPLISH SPLOSH

pages.text: But now there is a big problem. The water is so dirty, I can’t see. Look at all this scum!

blocks.text: But now there is a big problem.
The water is so dirty, I can’t see. Look at all this scum!

pages.text: I feel sad. I need my friends to help me find the problem. SPLISH SPLOSH YUCK!

blocks.text: I feel sad. I need my friends to help me find the problem.
SPLISH SPLOSH YUCK!

pages.text: First he finds Hoppy Heron. She is sad too. The water is so smelly! The fish are dying! I have nothing to eat!

blocks.text: First he finds Hoppy Heron. She is sad too.
The water is so smelly! The fish are dying! I have nothing to eat!

pages.text: Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem. EW! SPLISH SP LOSH YUCK!

blocks.text: Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem.
HOPFLAP
EW! SPLISH SP LOSH YUCK!

pages.text: They meet Jambo, the elephant. He is looking miserable. The water tastes so horrible, I can’t drink it.

blocks.text: They meet Jambo, the elephant. He is looking miserable.
The water tastes so horrible, I can’t drink it.

pages.text: Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem. S PURTPRAY S ICK! HOPFLAP EW! SPLISH SP LOSH YUCK!

blocks.text: Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem.
S PURTPRAY S ICK! HOPFLAP EW! SPLISH SP LOSH YUCK!

pages.text: When they get near where the people live, they stop and stare. Y U CK! It’s the people polluting the river.

blocks.text: When they get near where the people live, they stop and stare.
Y U CK!
It’s the people polluting the river.

pages.text: Hello! Why do you look so sad? Your stinky mess is making our river dirty! It makes us sick.

blocks.text: Hello! Why do you look so sad?
Your stinky mess is making our river dirty! It makes us sick.

pages.text: We’re so sorry! We must get help to fix this. KWAAAK!

blocks.text: We’re so sorry! We must get help to fix this.
KWAAAK!

pages.text: It’s getting late ... and the animals are tired. The pipe is fixed and the litter is gone. And now we can go home. S PLISHSPLOSH! HOPFLAP! SPURT SP RAY!

blocks.text: It’s getting late ... and the animals are tired. The pipe is fixed and the litter is gone.
And now we can go home.
S PLISHSPLOSH! HOPFLAP!
SPURT SP RAY!

pages.text: Guess what? The pool is already cleaner. Guess what? The water already smells better. Guess what? The water already tastes cleaner. It’s been a good day.

blocks.text: Guess what? The pool is already cleaner.
Guess what? The water already smells better.
Guess what? The water already tastes cleaner.
It’s been a good day.
